summary: Applied the Dockerized mail platform live on docker-runtime-lv3, published the mail DNS and ingress surfaces, and verified end-to-end inbound and outbound delivery with server@lv3.org.

verification.check: Outbound delivery from server mailbox sender
verification.observed: Brevo recorded message <202603221633.22851496592@smtp-relay.mailin.fr> as delivered to baditaflorin@gmail.com for subject 'LV3 mail platform final live test' from server@lv3.org.

verification.check: External inbound delivery to server mailbox
verification.observed: Brevo recorded message <202603221633.14937092395@smtp-relay.mailin.fr> as delivered to server@lv3.org for subject 'LV3 final inbound test from default sender', and the message was present in INBOX over IMAPS.
make converge-mail-platform completed successfully from the main integration worktree after the sender and DNS authentication path were finalized.
The monitoring role verified the managed Grafana dashboard with uid lv3-mail-platform and title 'LV3 Mail Platform'.

notes: The live rollout required an explicit Proxmox firewall allow-list update for TCP ports 25, 587, and 993 in addition to the existing nftables DNAT rules.

Brevo initially rejected sends because florin@badita.org was not a validated sender; the final live path uses server@lv3.org after lv3.org domain authentication and sender verification through the mailbox.
